title: Defend the Wayward Queen
description: Take Black and stop the early Scholar's Mate attack.

solution.pgn:
[Event "Wayward Queen Solution"]
[Result "*"]

1. e4 e5 2. Qh5 Nc6 3. Bc4 g6 4. Qf3 Nf6 *
solution.explanation: Develop the queen's knight to protect e5, meet Bc4 with ...g6, then develop ...Nf6 once the queen retreats to f3.
